description: Public client/team repository for Context Fabric. Holds the TypeScript SDK/CLI, sanitized documentation, generic examples, and templates. Safe to open-source.

forbidden.description: Nothing operator-specific or proprietary may ever land here.
patterns: any private operator/client project, channel, customer, or lead data
live credentials, API keys, tokens, OAuth secrets
imports of or dependencies on context-fabric-core
proprietary scoring weights or heuristics flagged as IP

dependencies.rule: Public packages must declare zero dependency on the private core. The SDK is a clean-room implementation.

checks: no example uses a real private operator/client project or channel name
